class.label: ALT header line
class.comment: Represents ##ALT=<ID=...,Description=...> used for symbolic alternate alleles.

class.label: field definition
class.comment: Common superclass for INFO/FORMAT/FILTER/ALT header definitions.

class.label: FORMAT field value
class.comment: A structured key/value for one FORMAT attribute within a sample call.

class.label: VCF header line
class.comment: A structured representation of one VCF header line (e.g., ##fileformat, ##INFO=<...>).

class.label: INFO field value
class.comment: A structured key/value for one INFO attribute within a record/call.

class.label: sample call
class.comment: Per-sample values for a variant call (e.g., GT, DP, AD), as declared by FORMAT header lines.

class.label: variant call
class.comment: Call-level representation for a record: QUAL/FILTER/INFO, plus FORMAT and per-sample fields.

class.label: VCF file
class.comment: A VCF file artifact (as a dataset distribution) that contains a header and a set of VCF records.

class.label: VCF header
class.comment: Container for the structured header lines of a VCF file.

class.label: VCF Number arity
class.comment: Represents INFO/FORMAT Number values (e.g., 0, 1, A, R, G, .).

class.label: VCF record
class.comment: A row in a VCF (CHROM, POS, ID, REF, ALT, QUAL, FILTER, INFO, FORMAT, samples...). This is a VCF-centric view; link to a sequence alteration representation via vcfr:asSequenceAlteration.

class.label: VCF value type
class.comment: Enumerates VCF Type values used in INFO/FORMAT definitions: Integer, Float, Flag, Character, String.

objectProperty.label: as sequence alteration
objectProperty.comment: Links a VCF record/call to a sequence alteration representation (e.g., SB/gvar SequenceAlteration: so:0001059).

objectProperty.label: chromosome / contig reference
objectProperty.comment: Reference sequence for CHROM, preferably resolvable (e.g., INSDC/RefSeq/Ensembl). Can align to FALDO reference.

objectProperty.label: declared by
objectProperty.comment: Links an INFO/FORMAT/FILTER/ALT value/usage to its header definition line.

datatypeProperty.label: ALT
datatypeProperty.comment: ALT allele string; for multiple ALT alleles you may repeat this property or use rdf:List externally.

datatypeProperty.label: field Number
datatypeProperty.comment: The VCF Number value as string (e.g., 0, 1, A, R, G, .).

datatypeProperty.label: field value
datatypeProperty.comment: Literal string value; for typed values prefer vcfr:fieldValueInteger/Decimal/Boolean when possible.

datatypeProperty.label: FILTER
datatypeProperty.comment: FILTER column value (e.g., PASS, ., or semicolon-separated list). Prefer splitting into multiple vcfr:filter values.

datatypeProperty.label: FORMAT raw
datatypeProperty.comment: Raw FORMAT string as in VCF (optional). Use structured vcfr:FormatFieldValue in SampleCall.

datatypeProperty.label: INFO raw
datatypeProperty.comment: Raw INFO string as in VCF (optional). Use structured vcfr:InfoFieldValue for machine-use.

datatypeProperty.label: ID
datatypeProperty.comment: VCF ID column (e.g., rsID). Use when present; otherwise omit.
